name: INNOVATIVE DESIGNS INC
business: Innovative Designs, Inc. produces and sells a house wrap product using Insultex a material with thermal resistance and buoyancy properties. The company also offers a cold weather product line called Artic Armor which also uses Insultex, but it no longer produces any Artic Armor products and is only selling from existing inventory. Insultex is obtained through a license agreement with the owner and manufacturer of the material.

exposures.sentence: Innovative Designs, Inc. produces and sells a house wrap product using Insultex a material with thermal resistance and buoyancy properties.
We also offer a cold weather product line called Artic Armor which also uses Insultex.
